flagged.detail: The closing </font> sits inside the cloze hint (after the :: separator), so although the raw field has matched <font>/</font>, after cloze splitting the back renders an unclosed <font color> that can bleed color into the Extra text.

The second c1 cloze opens a <font> in the answer body but places the closing </font> inside the hint (after ::); cloze splitting leaves an orphaned/unclosed font tag on the rendered side, so color may bleed though it renders acceptably.

notes: Batch 12 is a uniformly high-quality, all-cloze set drawn from MileDown's Behavioral deck (~54 cards, with tag breadcrumbs + image/link Extras) and a large Pankow P/S block (8C Social Behavior/Interactions, Biological Explanations, 9A Social Structures, 9B Demographics). Q/A correspondence is correct throughout, text is well-formed and non-empty with no unrendered template artifacts ({{, FrontSide, etc.), no LaTeX is present, and no image-only-without-text cards were found. The only issues are two cards where a closing </font> tag is authored inside the cloze hint (after the :: separator), leaving an orphaned/unclosed font tag on the rendered side; both are minor warnings that render acceptably.
